test_name: Active Records Count Validation For AX
source_query: select count(*) from (select Recid, Recversion, DPCreatedDateTime, DPModifiedDateTime, isdelete from (SELECT DISTINCT ISNULL(da.name,'') AS [BankAccountName], ISNULL(COALESCE(dav.displayvalue,dalv.displayvalue,''),'') AS [BankAccountValue], ISNULL(dft.description,'') AS [BankAccountDescription], CONVERT(varchar(20),ISNULL(dav.activefrom,'1900-01-01'),120) AS [ActiveFrom], CONVERT(varchar(20),ISNULL(dav.activeto,'1900-01-01'),120) AS [ActiveTo], ISNULL(dav.issuspended,0) AS [IsSuspended], ISNULL(fgv.Description,'') AS [GlobalDimensionValue], ISNULL(dav.recid,0) AS [Recid], ISNULL(dav.recversion,0) AS [Recversion], ISNULL(dav.lhname,'') AS [LHName], CONVERT(varchar(20),ISNULL(dav.dpcreateddatetime,'1900-01-01'),120) AS DPCreatedDateTime, CONVERT(varchar(20),ISNULL(dav.dpmodifieddatetime,'1900-01-01'),120) AS DPModifiedDateTime, dav.isdelete from (SELECT recid,recversion,dpcreateddatetime,dpmodifieddatetime,displayvalue,dimensionattribute,entityinstance,lhname,isdelete,activefrom,activeto,issuspended FROM dimensionattributevalue WHERE dpmodifieddatetime > '2019-01-01 00:00:00') as dav left join dimensionattribute as da on da.recid = dav.dimensionattribute and da.lhname = dav.lhname left join dimensionfinancialtag as dft on dav.entityinstance = dft.recid and dav.lhname = dft.lhname left join dimensionattributelevelvalue as dalv on dalv.dimensionattributevalue = dav.recid and dalv.lhname = dav.lhname left join dimensionattributevaluegroupcombination davg on davg.dimensionattributevaluegroup = dalv.dimensionattributevaluegroup and dalv.lhname = davg.lhname left join financeglobaldimensionvalues fgv on COALESCE(dav.displayvalue,dalv.displayvalue,'') = fgv.Dimension_value where da.name = 'BankAccount' and COALESCE(dav.displayvalue,dalv.displayvalue,'') <> '' and dav.isdelete = 0) X) a
target_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enterprise_dwh.Finance.DIM_BankAccount WHERE IsDelete <> 1
description: Validate active records from 2024 onwards match between Bronze and Silver
